name: Zivo Bioscience, Inc.
business: Zivo Bioscience develops and markets proprietary algal biomass and bioactive extracts for human and animal health applications. Its therapeutic pipeline targets diseases including poultry coccidiosis and bovine mastitis, while its nutrition segment sells dried algae powder as a food ingredient under the Zivolife brand. The company currently generates revenue from sales of Zivolife through distributor ZWorldwide.
sellsTo: human food and dietary supplement market
animal health market (poultry, livestock, companion animals)

exposures.sentence: Our strategy is to develop bioactive extracts, fractions, and molecules derived from our proprietary algal culture, targeting human and animal diseases, such as poultry coccidiosis, bovine mastitis, human cholesterol, and canine osteoarthritis.
For the nutrition side of our business, we have developed our proprietary algal culture to be commercially viable as a nutritional product.
ZWorldwide, functioning as a direct-to-consumer marketing company, is actively retailing the Zivolife TM product directly to consumers through its online platform at www.zivo.life.

catalysts.event: Reach full production capacity at Alimenta Algae facility
catalysts.sentence: Plans are to complete build-out at Alimenta Algae to reach full capacity in 2027, with capability to produce roughly 100,000 kg per year.

catalysts.event: Minimum purchase commitment from ZWorldwide through August 31, 2028
catalysts.sentence: ZWorldwide has committed to purchasing at least 2,000 kilograms of our product per month through August 31, 2028.

tamClaims.claim: The global poultry industry spent approximately $1.1 billion in 2024 on coccidiosis control
tamClaims.sentence: The global poultry industry spent approximately $1.1 billion in 2024 on coccidiosis control, primarily using decades-old compounds that industry and consumers alike want to replace due to the risks of developing drug resistance.

tamClaims.claim: In 2023, the global vegan protein powder market was estimated to be $4.6 billion
tamClaims.sentence: In 2023, the global vegan protein powder market was estimated to be $4.6 billion.

tamClaims.claim: The autoimmune market was $110.0 billion in 2017
tamClaims.sentence: The annual market sizes for the antibiotics, eubiotics, autoimmune, and the antidiabetic markets were approximately $40.0 billion in 2020, $37.9 billion in 2019, $110.0 billion in 2017 and $48.8 billion in 2018, respectively.
